commit.subject: LU-19967 osd: take extent tree depth and sb into account
commit.message:
LU-19967 osd: take extent tree depth and sb into account

for credits calculation.

Fixes: 1f3e4df2fb ("LU-18562 osd: llog write batch block allocation")
Fixes: 0844727c55 ("LU-15143 osd-ldiskfs: osd_declare_write() underestimates credits")
